name: Vegan Yogurt
recipeIngredient: Starter culture (divided equally between 2 or 3 storage jars)
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the starter culture equally between 2 or 3 storage jars (jam jars are ideal).
2. Fill each jar with soya milk.
3. Seal the jars and shake vigorously to mix.
4. Place the jars in the refrigerator until fermented, which takes 1-2 days.
